title: Breakwave Dry Bulk Shipping Report 1.7.2025
summary:
Main
in Weekly Shipbuilding Reports 07/01/2025
New Year Brings New Challenges, but It Is Weather That Will Determine Rates Near Term -The Christmas break provided little new insight
Source: Breakwave Advisors

Linked asset: 2025-01-07_BreakwaveDryJanuary72025Report.pdf

BDRY
Dry Bulk Shipping
January 7, 2025
Breakwave Dry Futures Index: 1,054 Baltic Dry Index (spot): 1,043 Short-term Indicators:
↑ 30D: 0.1% ↓ 30D: -10.6% Momentum: Positive
↑ YTD: 3.9% ↑ YTD: 4.6% Sentiment: Positive
↓ YOY: -30.4% ↓ YOY: -50.6% Fundamentals: Neutral
Bi-Weekly Report
• New Year Brings New Challenges, but It Is Weather That Will Determine Rates Near Term -The Christmas break
provided little new insight into an otherwise challenging dry bulk market. While the sharp declines seen in the previous
month appear to have moderated, the sector enters a seasonally weak period, with freight rates at their lowest levels
in many months. As previously discussed, this downturn is not unexpected; the market had been overly optimistic in
